pi_items.source: Task description and setup_openclinica.sh explicit insertion logic.
Direct verification of task description requirements mapped against OpenClinica's boolean and internal numeric enums. 'Only Year of Birth' maps to 2.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env update_study_parameters task by confirming the target study 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (DM-TRIAL-2024) is synthetically generated and explicitly injected via setup_openclinica.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified that the expected target study parameters (collect_dob='2' for Year of Birth, gender_required='f', person_id_shown_on_crf='f', interviewer_name_required='t', interview_date_required='t') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and verifier.py logic.
